name: Docker
description: This app uses the Docker remote API to perform a range of actions on existing containers within the user-specified domain

actions.name: Get Container Filesystem Changes
actions.description: Get added, modified, or deleted files of a container's filesystem

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

actions.name: Inspect Container
actions.description: Get low-level information about a container

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Get size of the container as fields SizeRw and SizeRootFs

actions.name: Update Container
actions.description: Change various configuration options of a container without having to recreate it

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: request_body
parameters.description: Configuration

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait before killing the container

actions.name: Export Container
actions.description: Export the contents of a container as a tarball

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Get all containers. By default, only running containers are shown

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Return this number of most recently created containers, including non-running ones

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Return size of the container as fields SizeRw and SizeRootFs

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filters to process on the container list, encoded as JSON (a map[string][]string). For example, {"status": ["paused"]} will only return paused containers

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: detachkeys
parameters.description: Override the key sequence for detaching a container. The format is a single character [a-Z] or ctrl-<value> where <value> is one of: a-z, @, ^, [, , or _

actions.name: List Images
actions.description: Returns a list of images on the server. Note that it uses a different, smaller representation of an image than inspecting a single image

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Show all images. Only images from a final layer (no children) are shown by default

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: A JSON encoded value of the filters (a map[string][]string) to process on the images list, e.g., {"status":["exited"]}

parameters.name: digests
parameters.description: Show digest information as a RepoDigests field on each image

actions.name: Rename Container
actions.description: Rename a container based on the provided new name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New name for the container

actions.name: Kill Container
actions.description: Send a POSIX signal to a container, defaulting to killing the container

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Signal to be sent to the container as an integer or string, e.g., SIGINT, default is SIGKILL

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container

parameters.name: volumes
parameters.description: Remove the volumes associated with the container

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: If the container is running, kill it before removing it

parameters.name: link
parameters.description: Remove the specified link associated with the container

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filters to process on the prune list, encoded as JSON (a map[string][]string), e.g., {"status":["exited"]}

actions.name: Remove Image
actions.description: Remove an image, along with any untagged parent images that were referenced by that image. Images can't be removed if they have any descendant images or being used by a running container or build

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Image Name or ID

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Remove the image even if it is being used by any stopped containers or has other tags

parameters.name: noprune
parameters.description: Do not delete untagged parent images

actions.name: Delete Unused Images
actions.description: Delete all unused images based on the specified filters

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filters to process on the prune list, encoded as JSON (a map[string][]string), e.g., {"status":["exited"]}

actions.name: Get Image History
actions.description: Get parent layers of an image

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Image Name or ID

actions.name: Delete Builder Cache
actions.description: Remove cache generated from building the container

parameters.name: keep_storage
parameters.description: Amount of disk space in bytes to keep for cache

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Remove all types of the build cache

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: A JSON encoded value of the filters (a map[string][]string) to process on the image list, e.g., {"status":["exited"]}

actions.name: Take Container Snapshot
actions.description: Take a snapshot of one of the containers

parameters.name: container
parameters.description: ID or Name of the container to commit

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: Repository Name for the created image

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag name for the created image

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Commit message

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: Author of the image, e.g., John Hannibal Smith <hannibal@a-team.com>

parameters.name: pause
parameters.description: Pause the container before committing

parameters.name: changes
parameters.description: Dockerfile instructions to apply while committing

parameters.name: request_body
parameters.description: Configuration

actions.name: Create Container
actions.description: Create a container from an existing image

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Assign the specified name to the container

parameters.name: request_body
parameters.description: Configuration
